zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna 'Hanna' Sherman於1589年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Edmund Sherman41歲，母親Anne Clere29歲。她於1610年5月3日與Richard Backler在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1663年9月5日在她的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna 'Hanna' Sherman于1589年出生在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Edmund Sherman41岁，母亲Anne Clere29岁。她于1610年5月3日与Richard Backler在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1663年9月5日在她的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: 'Hanna'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hannah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna 'Hanna' Sherman was born in 1589, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Sherman, was 41 and her mother, Anne Clere, was 29. She married Richard Backler on 3 May 1610, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 5 September 1663, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna 'Hanna' Sherman est née en 1589, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Sherman, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Anne Clere, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Backler le 3 mai 1610, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1663, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna 'Hanna' Sherman 1589 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Sherman 41 und ihre Mutter Anne Clere 29. Sie hat am 3. Mai 1610 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Richard Backler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. September 1663 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Richard Backler il 3 maggio 1610, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anna 'Hanna' Shermanが1589年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Edmund Shermanは41歳，母Anne Clereは29歳であった。1610年5月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでRichard Backlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1663年9月5日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna 'Hanna' Sherman(이)가 1589년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Sherman(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Clere(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1610년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Richard Backler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1663년 9월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna 'Hanna' Sherman родилась в 1589 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Sherman было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Clere, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Backler 3 мая 1610 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 5 сентября 1663 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
